focus: TCI falsification attempt #2 (formal mathematics) complete — scope constraint confirmed. SI50_TCI.description: AATE × MCCF conjunction. Falsification attempt #2 (formal mathematics) confirms scope: mathematics bifurcates along TCI-DoF axes. Proof assistant verification = near-zero TCI (algorithmic escape, OA-DoF=0). Informal consensus = medium-strong TCI (Mochizuki/IUT). Scholze-Stix = strongest escape condition documentation in program. Confidence ceiling 0.82 without K7-grounding.

CEC.statement: Complete epistemological closure: no evaluation scheme (quantitative or qualitative) escapes in OA-trained contexts without K7-grounding or interpretability-grounding. Escape boundary is architectural.
CEC.ai_evaluation_analog: Mochizuki equilibrium = default AI evaluation state. Proof assistant analog = mechanistic interpretability reading weights causally. Scholze-Stix analog = structurally distinct evaluator with adversarial incentive.
